description: Juggalo gangs are criminal groups that adopt the name and imagery of Juggalo culture, the fanbase of Insane Clown Posse. They have been classified as a criminal street gang by the FBI and other agencies, with documented sets in at least 21 U.S. states. These gangs engage in crimes such as murder, drug trafficking, and arson, and have formed alliances with established gangs like Bloods and Crips. The majority of Juggalos are non-criminal music fans, but a minority constitute the criminal element.

country_links.evidence_quote: three youths in Fairfield, Australia believed to have been Juggalos attempted to rob a 20-year-old woman waiting outside a club.
country_links.context: Juggalo gang members attempted to rob a woman in Fairfield, Australia.
